source_spans.text: In both cases, the input (fertilization) of nutrients strongly stimulates the growth of Polytrichum strictum colonies

nodes.name: Release of nutrients from the burning of plant tissues

source_spans.text: The release of nutrients from the burning of plant tissues is probably the main reason for the sudden growth of Polytrichum strictum populations

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:813d43e929a9
edges.original_sentence: In both cases, the input (fertilization) of nutrients strongly stimulates the growth of Polytrichum strictum colonies, which are rapidly overgrown by Sphagnum colonies in burned bogs.

source_spans.text: In both cases, the input (fertilization) of nutrients strongly stimulates the growth of Polytrichum strictum colonies, which are rapidly overgrown by Sphagnum colonies in burned bogs.

source_document.title: Peatland restoration in southern Québec (Canada): A paleoecological perspective>

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:77b1c83ccfe1
edges.original_sentence: The release of nutrients from the burning of plant tissues is probably the main reason for the sudden growth of Polytrichum strictum populations in fire-disturbed bogs.

source_spans.text: The release of nutrients from the burning of plant tissues is probably the main reason for the sudden growth of Polytrichum strictum populations in fire-disturbed bogs.

source_document.title: Peatland restoration in southern Québec (Canada): A paleoecological perspective>

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:0c5714a61e31
edges.original_sentence: In mined bogs, P. strictum helps stabilize the soil surface, prevents wind erosion and frost heaving, and seems to favour the subsequent establishment of Sphagnum colonies (Rochefort, 2000).

source_spans.text: In mined bogs, P. strictum helps stabilize the soil surface, prevents wind erosion and frost heaving, and seems to favour the subsequent establishment of Sphagnum colonies (Rochefort, 2000).

source_document.title: Peatland restoration in southern Québec (Canada): A paleoecological perspective>
